use_cases: Triggering form submissions in contact forms
Initiating actions like save, delete, or submit
Acting as call-to-action elements in any interface
ai_summary: A reusable Button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, featuring multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes. Styled with Tailwind CSS for consistent ring-offset focus states and smooth hover transitions. Designed as a foundational atomic component for any React application requiring interactive buttons.
